title: Flu vaccine events scheduled in Bethel and villages
summary: Mark your calendar! YKHC will be offering the 2022/2023 flu shot at upcoming mass dispensing events across the region in October. Everyone 6 months and older is encouraged to receive a seasonal flu shot. In Bethel , a drive-through flu vaccine event will be held 10 a.m. to 2 p.m., Saturday, Oct. 22...

title: October 2022 Newsletter
summary: Elections | Nominations | BSAI Crab | Small Vessel Access | Trawl EM | Greenland Turbot | Groundfish Specs | Spatial Management Policy | Stock Prioritization | Bristol Bay Red King Crab | Universal Data Collection | AM80 Program Review | PCFMAC | CCTF | Ecosystem | EFH | Staff Tasking Elections and New Members The Council swore in Angel Drobnica as its newest member, and swore in Nicole Kimball for a second term at the beginning of its October meeting. The Council also unanimously re-elected Simon Kinneen as Chair and Bill Tweit as Vice-Chair. Ms. Drobnica, from Juneau, has participated in the council process as an Advisory Panel member and Chair of the AP. She is the Director of Fisheries and Government Affairs for the Aleutian-Pribilof Island Community Development Association. Nicole Kimball was re-appointed for a second term. Ms. Kimball is the vice president of the Pacific Seafood Processors Association. Additionally, Steve Williams joined the Council as a representative of the Ore...

title: Update to COVID-19 testing hours in Bethel
summary: Effective Monday, Oct. 17, COVID-19 testing hours in the hospital in Bethel are changing. Testing will be available noon to 6 p.m., Monday through Friday. To receive a COVID-19 test in villages, contact your local clinic. If you tested positive for COVID-19 on an at-home test, please call YKHC Conta...

title: Planning Commission Meets October 25. Here’s how to weigh in….
summary: The Regular Planning Commission meets October 25, 2022, at 7 P.M. This meeting will be a hybrid meeting held both in person and via Zoom, and will be to review permits for a CBJ Property Disposal and Conditional Use Permit to create seven (7) apartments.
